# **Spec Sheet RFQ & Proposal**

## **RFQ: Unified Wire & Cable Collateral Suite**

**Project Objective** Transition Unified Wire & Cable (UWC) from text-heavy technical sheets to a high-end, visual-first collateral suite. The objective is to produce eight (8) distinct designs—one global "Company Offering" and seven "Individual Application" deep-dives—for a trade show in **May 2026**.

**1\. Strategic Category Breakdown** The agency should provide estimates for the following eight (8) design templates:

* **01 | General Company Offering:** A high-level overview of UWC’s manufacturing capabilities, including vertical integration (copper fabrication to extrusion) and ISO 9001:2015 certification.  
* **02 | Automotive:** Highlighting XLPE (GXL, SXL, TXL) and primary wires (GPT) meeting SAE J1128 standards.  
* **03 | Marine & Boat Cable:** Showcasing GPTM and tinned copper solutions that withstand corrosive environments.  
* **04 | Building & Lighting:** Deep-dive into THHN, TFN/TFFN, and gauge ranges up to 750 MCM.  
* **05 | UL Style & Hook-up Wire:** Detailed tables for UL 1028, 1007/1569, and 1061 styles.  
* **06 | Power Distribution & Battery:** Focusing on heavy-duty SGT, SGX, and STT battery cables.  
* **07 | Specialty Cords & Flexible Cable:** Highlighting portable cords (SOOW, STOW) and appliance-specific ripcord/parallel bonded wire.  
* **08 | Custom OEM & Industrial Solutions:** Showcasing UWC’s ability to build custom constructions for elevators/hoists and Mil-Spec applications.

**2\. Design & Technical Requirements**

* **Creative Direction:** Designs must feature high-fidelity, "lifestyle" industrial photography (e.g., wiring in an engine or a boat's hull) on the front, with clean, technical data tables on the reverse.  
* **Photography:** Agency is responsible for either sourcing or art-directing new photography to replace current placeholders.  
* **Compliance Branding:** All sheets must feature relevant regulatory marks: UL, REACH, RoHS, and the "Made in USA" badge.

**3\. Production & Timeline**

* **Printing:** 500–750 units per design (Total: 4,000–6,000 units).  
* **Specifications:** Double-sided, full-bleed color, heavy-weight gloss or matte cardstock.  
* **Deadline:** **Final delivery by April 30, 2026**, for a trade show the second week of May.


## **Spec Sheet Estimate**

This official estimate outlines the digital transformation of Unified Wire & Cable’s (UWC) sales collateral from its current text-heavy format into a high-end, visual-first suite. Our goal is to exceed the design quality of industry peers while strictly adhering to your trade show deadline in the second week of May.

## **Project Scope: The "Elite Industrial" Suite**

We will develop **eight (8) unique, double-sided 8.5" x 11" designs**. These will utilize a "Lifestyle-Technical" architecture: a high-impact, agency-captured and AI-refined industrial scene on the front, with clean, technical data tables on the reverse.

### **1\. Strategic Collateral Categories**

* 01 | Corporate Capabilities: Flagship sheet showing full vertical manufacturing and "Made in USA" status.

* 02 | Automotive Solutions: Technical specs for XLPE (GXL, SXL, TXL) and GPT primary wires meeting SAE J1128.

* 03 | Marine & Boat Cable: Highlighting corrosion-resistant GPTM and tinned copper conductors.

* 04 | Building & Lighting: Deep-dive into THHN and TFN/TFFN ranging up to 750 MCM.

* 05 | UL Style & Hook-Up: Detailed tables for UL 1028, 1007/1569, and 1061 styles.

* 06 | Power & Battery: Showcasing heavy-duty SGT, SGX, and STT battery cable configurations.

* 07 | Specialty Cords: Covering portable and flexible cord types like SOOW and STOW.

* 08 | Custom OEM & Industrial: Highlighting hoistway/elevator cables and Mil-Spec (Type B/C) capabilities.

  ---

## **Technical Execution & Production**

### **Agency On-Site iPhone Capture & AI Refinement**

The agency will perform the on-site photoshoot using iPhone technology to capture specific wire gauges, cross-sections, and facility environments. These expert captures provide the "structural grounding" for the **Nano Banana** AI model, which will then "resurface" the images—adding professional studio lighting and placing products into hyper-realistic industrial environments with 4K clarity.

### **Premium Print Specifications**

* **Dimensions**: 8.5" x 11" (US Letter) with full-bleed.  
* **Stock**: Heavy-weight 100lb gloss cover.  
* **Finish**: Aqueous (AQ) coating for durability and a premium feel.  
* **Volume**: 750 high-quality prints per design (6,000 total units)


| Phase | Deliverables | Investment |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **I: Creative Strategy** | Research, category architecture, and AI style guide definition. | $2,000 – $2,400 |
| **II: Agency On-Site Shoot** | On-site iPhone photoshoot labor for 8 categories. | $1,000 – $1,300 |
| **III: Design & Data** | 8 Custom double-sided layouts with technical data migration. | $5,800 – $6,800 |
| **IV: AI Image Production** | Gemini-powered refinement of iPhone captures into 4K assets. | $2,450 – $3,200 |
| **V: Print & Production** | **Full Cost**: Pre-press labor \+ 6,000 physical premium units. | $3,750 – $4,300 |
| **Total Project Estimate** | **(All Agency Labor \+ Physical Production Costs)** | **$15,000 – $18,000** |


  ## **Project Timeline**

* **On-Site Photography**: Week of February 16, 2026\.  
* **AI Drafting & Refinement**: February 23 – March 13, 2026\.  
* **Final Design Approvals**: April 10, 2026\.  
* **Print Delivery**: May 1, 2026 (Guaranteed for your trade show).
